name: vibe-recipe
description: Vibe coding, with a recipe to follow. Spec-driven workflow with cooking-metaphor skills, specialist subagents, deterministic hooks, and stack-agnostic templates.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven agent workflow with recipes, reviews, and release gates.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Recipe helps agents and non-developers follow a structured path from project setup through specs, implementation, verification, and release. It includes 11 skills, eight specialist subagents, deterministic hooks, project templates, and adapter scripts.
defaultPrompt: Use kitchen to set up this project.
Write a recipe for my next feature.
Taste the current changes before merge.
